title: Generative AI’s power sparks fears of dumbing humans down

title: The AI backlash has tech executives fearing for their lives
description: Violent threats against artificial-intelligence companies are rising and spilling over into real-world security incidents.
content:
Police in San Francisco have responded to several threats against employees of Anthropic and OpenAI, according to records viewed by the Journal.

title: AI knows what you did online. Now your employer does, too
description: Artificial intelligence makes it easier than ever to trace your online history, and trying to cover your tracks can backfire and sabotage your career.
content:
Recent events underscore the growing number of ways online activities, even from the distant past, can haunt people.

title: Global Market Today: Asian equities drop led by Kospi, oil extends gain
description: Asian stocks declined as semiconductor shares faced renewed selling pressure. Crude oil prices climbed higher due to fresh strikes in the Middle East. Government bonds in Australia and New Zealand opened higher after US inflation data. Traders reduced expectations for Federal Reserve interest rate increases this year. Investors assess if strong earnings can sustain the artificial intelligence rally.

title: India, EU strengthen strategic partnership at 3rd TTC; announce cooperation in AI, semiconductors, clean technologies
description: The European Union and India on Wednesday reaffirmed their commitment to strengthen strategic cooperation in trade, technology and security at the third meeting of the India-EU Trade and Technology Council (TTC), with both sides agreeing to deepen collaboration in artificial intelligence, semiconductors, quantum technologies, clean energy and resilient supply chains.

title: Chinese Startup Dongfang Suanxin Develops 3D Chip Architecture to Bypass U.S. Export Restrictions
description: Chinese startup Dongfang Suanxin has announced a new chip design using a three-dimensional architecture that company officials say can compete with Nvidia’s artificial intelligence (AI) processors while employing older, unrestricted manufacturing nodes. title: Nasdaq 100 price swings leaves analysts on Wall Street worried
description: Such sharp moves have only taken place on four previous instances since the turn of the millennium - the Covid shock of 2020, the bear market of 2022, the global financial crisis of 2008, and the bust of the dotcom bubble in 2000. Some cautious analysts are drawing a similar parallel to the ongoing Artificial Intelligence boom.
content:
A similar trend was observed by BTIG Chief Market Technician Jonathan Krinsky, who observed the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index (SOX) had seen at least 15 up or down moves of at least 3% in the last 30 days, a streak last seen in 2000.

title: AI adoption accelerates, but maturity lags
description: Thailand's artificial intelligence (AI) adoption is growing rapidly, with 43% of surveyed organisations now using AI continuously, up from 32% last year.
content:
